name: scraper-bun-hono
description: Self-hosted web scraper starter — Bun + Hono + Postgres with content cache, per-domain policy learning, and a bundled Claude skill. Runs on a single Hetzner AX42 box. Grows into a full tier-escalation cascade (Playwright stealth, IPv6 /64 rotation, residential proxy, Firecrawl fallback).
postMessage:
Scraper starter installed in ./scraper

Next steps:
  1. cd scraper && cp env.example .env
  2. docker compose up -d       # starts postgres + scraper on :3021
  3. curl -X POST http://localhost:3021/scrape -H 'content-type: application/json' -d '{"url":"https://example.com"}'

Local dev (without Docker):
  bun install && bun run dev

The bundled Claude skill at .claude/skills/scrape/SKILL.md teaches agents in your project to prefer this scraper over WebFetch.

To grow it into the full 4-tier cascade (Playwright stealth → IPv6 /64 rotation → residential proxy → Firecrawl fallback), see the 'Growing this starter' section in README.md.
